tasks.name: Docker Desktop (Click + Install)
tasks.description: Open Docker Desktop download page and install via GUI. Optional command can install via winget.
tasks.notes: If using GUI: download installer -> next -> next -> finish. Reboot if prompted.

tasks.name: Git Installation by CLI
tasks.description: Install Git using winget and verify version.

tasks.name: Node.js Setup by CLI
tasks.description: Install Node.js LTS and validate npm.

tasks.name: Copy Runtime Template File
tasks.description: Copy base runtime env file to execution folder.

tasks.name: System Configuration Setup
tasks.description: Set machine-level AGENT_HOME variable and verify.
